text.title: OpenAI Function Calling — Output Contract
text.summary: Per-call record for either a tool-call response (tool_calls populated) or a structured-extraction (parsed populated). Captures model, refusal, tool_calls, parsed, and timing.

list.item: kind ∈ {tool_calls, parsed, content} — exactly one populated.
refusal recorded; null if model complied.
If kind == tool_calls: every entry has id + name + arguments.
If kind == parsed: parsed is a non-null object matching the requested Pydantic schema.

antipattern.description: kind == parsed AND parsed == null AND refusal == null.
antipattern.reason: Impossible state; indicates an SDK bug or a pipeline that swallowed the refusal.

antipattern.description: kind == tool_calls AND any tool_call missing `id`.
antipattern.reason: tool_call_id is the only correlation key between assistant message and tool result.

example.note: Invalid: kind=parsed but parsed=null and no refusal; latency_ms and request_id missing.

list.item: Exactly one of (parsed, tool_calls, content) populated, matching `kind`.
refusal handled: if non-null, downstream is notified.
Every tool_call has id, name, arguments.
